name: Islem KOBBI
title: PhD Researcher – AI, Robotics & Autonomous Systems
institution: INRIA Paris · Valeo anSWer · Sorbonne Université
bio: PhD candidate at INRIA Paris & Valeo anSWer. My research applies reinforcement learning to decision-making and motion planning for autonomous systems. I hold a dual engineering background in AI and Automation. My work covers the full R&D pipeline , from algorithm design and simulation to deployment on ground robots. I focus on bridging AI research with practical, scalable engineering.
